answers.question: Runtime ownership audit scope for mb_* functions?
answers.answer: Exhaustive audit of ALL mb_* runtime functions. Classify every return value as new reference (caller owns) or borrowed reference (caller must retain). This is safer and prevents future regressions.

answers.question: Should re-enabling GC be part of this change or a separate issue?
answers.answer: Include GC re-enable in this change. After refcounting is working correctly with EMIT_REFCOUNT_CALLS=true, re-enable GC in gc.rs (set enabled: true).
